tools.Name: Local Deep Research
tools.Description: An AI-powered research assistant that performs deep, agentic research using multiple LLMs and search engines with proper citations.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex research tasks, synthesizing reports from web and local documents, and building a searchable knowledge base.

tools.Name: Claude for Financial Services
tools.Description: A collection of reference agents, skills, and data connectors for financial workflows like investment banking and equity research.
tools.Use_Case: Automating financial workflows such as pitch deck creation, model building, GL reconciliation, and KYC screening.

tools.Name: PageIndex
tools.Description: A vectorless, reasoning-based RAG system that uses hierarchical tree indexing to simulate human-like retrieval.
tools.Use_Case: Retrieving highly relevant context from long, complex professional documents without the limitations of traditional vector embeddings.
